title: Powered Platform for Building Maintenance (Manned Suspended Skyclimber)

items.acceptanceCriteria: Equipment documentation is available
Preventive Maintenance is established and updated records are maintained
Daily pre-operational inspection checklists are checked (if applicable)
Previous inspection reports are checked
Warning notice, cautions or restrictions for safe operation and maintenance are clearly displayed and legible (Including wind speed)
Two qualified/trained operators are operating the machine (one at each side)
A sign is posted warning the operator not to rely solely on any automatic device as a substitute for safe operating practice
Clearly marked with the following: (a) name of the manufacturer (b) serial number and year of manufacture (c) safe working load (maximum number of users)
Safe working load and number of persons are clearly marked on the work platform
Self Weight of the platform is clearly marked
Each suspension jib is marked up with a unique ID number, safe working load and any fitted counterbalance load
All shackles are fully secured and fitted with lock pins where required (or wire-locked)
All hooks are fully secured
The specifications for the suspension wire ropes and connections recommended by the hoisting machine manufacturer are checked
Electric motors, used as the prime mover for a hoist, shall be protected with a current overload device or a circuit protected by a current overload device located on the hoist or on the carriage.
Each motor shall be provided with the manufacturer ’s nameplate listing all pertinent characteristics. Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Platform surfaces are slip-resistant materials
Platform dimensions are not less than 24" (610mm) wide working area and a minimum of 12" (305mm) wide passage way
Platform guardrails are provided and secure

The guardrail system shall consist of a 42-in. (1.067-m) high enclosure on the ends and outboard side. The inboard side shall not be less than 36 in. (914 mm) high. The enclosures shall consist of a top guardrail, a midrail, and a 4-in. (102-mm) high toeboard.
Welded members/joints are free of defects and corrosion

The equipment installation utilizes angulated roping, a stabilizing force of at least 10 lb (4.5 kg) is maintained under all conditions of loading, and only where the rise of the suspended portion of the equipment does not exceed 130 ft (40 m).
Each platform occupant has a ` or safety belt (with anchorage for a tail line or a lanyard)
A tail line or a lanyard has means to be secured to a trolley line or a separate lifeline
Each hoist machine/motor is capable of raising and lowering 125% of hoist rated load
Electric motors are protected with a current overload device
Speed reducers are of positive/gear reduction type (friction type is not allowed)
Speed reducers are directly connected to the elevating mechanism of the hoisting machine
All moving parts are guarded
Gear reduction speed reducers are in compliance with the standards of the American Gear Manufacturers Association
Minimum of two independent hoist brakes are provided
hoist brakes automatically engage whenever power is interrupted (Primary brakes)
Primary brakes hold 125% of the hoist's rated load Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Primary brakes are directly connected to the hoist's drive train (belts, shear pins, clutches, roller chains, or friction devices are prohibited)
Automatic secondary brakes hold 125% of the hoist's rated load within a vertical distance of 24" (610mm)
Secondary brakes act directly on the suspension wire rope (or on the drum or drum extension on a winding drum type hoist)
The secondary brake arel not used to stop the hoist except under overspeed or abnormal conditions
Lubrication of the hoisting machine and moving parts is adequate
Lubrication points are accessible
Fillets are provided as points of change in the diameter of hoisting machinery shafts and sheave shafts to prevent excessive stress concentration in the shafts
Fitted keys, splines, bolts, or machine screws are used in all connections subject to torque
All threaded fasteners have an antiloosening device
Suitable runways, ladders, stairs, or platforms are provided for safe access to and egress from all manned scaffold platforms
A two way radio or a two-way telephone system shall be provided for every manned platform.
Wire rope classification is as per manufacturer specifications (check equipment manual)
Suspension rope diameter is not less than 5/16" (8mm)
Rope cores are one of the following: fiber, independent wire rope, or wire strand, or coated electrical conductors (check manufacturer's recommendations)
Wire rope is adequately lubricated
Wire rope is free of kinks, crushes and birdcagings
Wire rope is not heat damaged
Wire rope is free of rust, corrosion or pettings Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Wire rope does not have four randomly distributed broken wires in three lays
Wire rope does not have two broken wires in one strand in three lays
Wire rope does not have more than two broken wires in the vicinity of end attachments
Wire rope does not show evidence of core failure (a lengthening of rope lay and a reduction in rope diameter suggests core failure)
Wire rope does not have more than one valley break (broken wire)

Suspension wire rope fasteners are one of the following: 1) Individual tapered babbitted sockets 2) Zinced fastenings for wire rope 1Ú2" (13mm) diameter and larger 3) Swaged fittings (U- Type wire rope clips are not allowed)
Platform is fitted with face rollers are its lower inner edge (to protect the surface of the supporting structure) Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Upper anchorage brackets and jibs are fully secured to permanent and certified points on the structure
Each outrigger shall be tied back to a certified anchorage on the building with a minimum of 5Ú16 in. (8.0 mm) wire rope
All exposed noncurrent-carrying metal parts are grounded
Electrical wirings and components are free of damages
The independent power supply to the equipment is provided with a disconnect switch
All electrical controls are housed in weatherproof enclosures
Control systems are provided with electrical overloads protection devices
Traveling cables/conductors are insulated
A fire extinguisher with B-C rating is provided and securely attached on the platform Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
